name: ai.autonomad/travel
description: Free travel app for people — and a booking tool for AI agents. Book flights, hotels, activities, and events worldwide via Claude, ChatGPT, the iOS/Android apps, or autonomad.ai.

environmentVariables.name: AUTONOMAD_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Autonomad API base URL. Defaults to production.

environmentVariables.name: AUTONOMAD_AGENT_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to expose autonomous-agent tools (register_agent, DID-based booking). Default human mode is for Claude/ChatGPT users.
